request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: Will CZ (Changpeng Zhao) be sentenced to prison?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if Changpeng Zhao receives any custodial jail or prison sentence
in "United States v. Changpeng Zhao" by December 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET.
Resolves NO if the sentence is probation, fines, or home confinement only.
Resolution based on official court records or credible news reporting consensus.

Settlement entities: ['U.S. Department of Justice', 'Commodity Futures Trading Commission', 'Financial Crimes Enforcement Network', 'Binance', 'Changpeng Zhao']

conditions.label: Custodial sentence by 2024-12-31
conditions.summary: YES if, in “United States v. Changpeng Zhao,” a U.S. court imposes any custodial jail or prison term (including time served) on CZ by Dec 31, 2024, 11:59 PM ET. Excludes probation, fines, or home confinement only.
